full_text:
Ziying, King of Qin [Ying Qin] 秦王子嬰嬴秦
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ziying, King of Qin [Ying Qin] (秦王子嬰嬴秦). Qin dynasty. Third and final ruler of Qin. Presided over 46 fragmented final days of the dynasty. Ziying, King of Qin [Ying Qin] was an historic figure affiliated with Qin.
